summary: Testing Persona Switcher bug fix and P1 messaging features - All tested features working correctly

issues: Minor console warning: 'Received %s for a non-boolean attribute' related to JSX boolean handling - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: MessagesPage.js line 55-60: getFolders function correctly uses isMasked parameter to determine Pro Lounge visibility
MessagesPage.js line 334-339: Mutual follow badge implemented correctly with emerald green Users icon
MessagesPage.js line 356-361: Follow status text indicators ('Mutuals', 'Follows you') implemented
MessagesPage.js line 1234-1256: Request banner with Accept/Decline buttons implemented with proper data-testid attributes
Backend profiles.py line 106-183: search_profiles correctly returns is_following, follows_you, is_mutual fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Persona Switcher Pro Lounge bug is FIXED. When masking as non-Pro persona (e.g., Photographer), Pro Lounge folder correctly hides. Mutual follow indicator and accept/decline request features are implemented but no test data exists for mutual follows or message requests to test the visual indicators.

pro_lounge_bug_fix.description: Pro Lounge folder correctly hidden when viewing as non-Pro persona (Photographer). isMasked parameter fix working.

god_mode_pro_lounge.description: Pro Lounge folder visible when in God Mode default or Pro persona

persona_switcher.description: Can switch personas via Admin Dashboard dropdown, sidebar shows 'Viewing as' with correct role

compose_modal_search.description: Compose modal opens, search works, results show user role and icons

mutual_follow_indicator.description: Code implemented for emerald badge and 'Mutuals'/'Follows you' text, but no mutual follow relationships exist in test data

accept_decline_buttons.description: Code implemented with data-testid attributes, but no message requests exist to test UI

requests_folder.description: Requests folder accessible, shows 'No conversations in requests' when empty

backend_follow_status_api.description: Profile search API returns is_following, follows_you, is_mutual fields

backend_accept_endpoint.description: POST /api/messages/accept/{id} endpoint exists and responds correctly

backend_decline_endpoint.description: POST /api/messages/decline/{id} endpoint exists and responds correctly

backend_delete_conversation.description: DELETE /api/messages/conversation/{id} endpoint exists and responds correctly
